obligations.intent: Keep ZGE web-push and VAPID delivery behavior wired through the fork.
obligations.observable_contract: Configured VAPID credentials produce authenticated browser push registration and delivery without exposing private key material.
obligations.recheck_trigger: Any push, VAPID, browser notification, or dependency-manifest change.

obligations.intent: Preserve ZGE OMP settings and agent path integration.
obligations.observable_contract: The dashboard resolves OMP settings and agent directories from the configured home and keeps agent session discovery functional.
obligations.recheck_trigger: Any OMP configuration, agent path, home-directory, or session-discovery change.

obligations.intent: Keep deployment and standalone installer behavior safe and reproducible.
obligations.observable_contract: A clean installation starts the dashboard, exposes health, and does not copy unmanaged skill or ledger artifacts.
obligations.recheck_trigger: Any installer, Docker, deployment workflow, package boundary, or health endpoint change.

obligations.intent: Keep upstream sync tooling deterministic, reviewable, and repository-owned.
obligations.observable_contract: Sync requests, ledger records, proof paths, and approved plans are validated deterministically before any integration mutation.
obligations.recheck_trigger: Any upstream sync, validator, ledger, approval, or executor behavior change.
